headline: Netflix stock falls as earnings forecast disappoints, company says it will give fewer engagement updates
detail: Weak earnings and guidance from a major tech player like Netflix can signal broader softness in the growth sector, potentially impacting sentiment for your general tech holdings.
rec: Consider trimming broad tech exposure like QQQ or QQQI to reduce risk from sector-wide sentiment shifts.

headline: Alphabet’s stock falls as Gemini delays suggest Google is struggling to keep up in the AI race
detail: Another tech giant facing headwinds, specifically in the critical AI space, reinforces negative sentiment for the tech sector. This adds to the case for caution in your concentrated portfolio.
rec: This provides further reason to consider trimming positions like QQQ or QQQI to manage overall tech exposure.

headline: Semiconductor stocks are on the verge of a bear market. Is the thrill in the chips trade gone?
detail: This is a direct and serious warning for your highly concentrated semiconductor holdings. A bear market in chips means significant downside risk, amplified by your margin and leveraged ETFs like SOXL.
rec: Given the "SELL" status and -44.02% loss, seriously consider cutting SOXL to stem further losses. Also, review your stop on SMH.
